items.title: New India bill to amend transgender rights sparks protests
items.dek: The bill seeks to change how transgender people are legally recognised and their right to self-identify.
items.body: The bill seeks to change how transgender people are legally recognised and their right to self-identify.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We are being choked': Philippines transport workers strike over fuel costs
items.dek: It comes as a ship carrying barrels of Russian crude oil arrived in the Philippines earlier this week.
items.body: It comes as a ship carrying barrels of Russian crude oil arrived in the Philippines earlier this week.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How will the UK respond to US court verdict on social media?
items.dek: Will the decision of a Los Angeles jury have an impact on the UK government as it considers potential future regulations on social media, writes the BBC's polit
items.body: Will the decision of a Los Angeles jury have an impact on the UK government as it considers potential future regulations on social media, writes the BBC's political editor.
items.author: IriLine Desk
